Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KEEP AMERICA SAFE AND BEAUTIFUL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/HEK)
